creator: cagney@cygnus.com
text:
Excerpts from mail: 19-Mar-99 Re: docs/10664: Notes on 2... Dag-Erling
Smorgrav@floo (272)

> Dag-Erling Smorgrav <des@flood.ping.uio.no> writes:
> > If you have the sources installed, there is a script for converting
> > named.boot to named.conf:

> Uh, my bad: it is actually installed as /usr/sbin/named-bootconf.

Ah, thanks!  Something to add to the upgrade notes.  Too late in my case
but useful all the same.

	enjoy,
		Andrew
